vibe_report.summary: A calm, warm Japandi interior tuned for a young family: layered natural materials, low-profile furniture, and a designated cozy work corner. The palette leans warm-neutral with muted earth tones, plenty of horizontal lines and negative space, and carefully placed organic accents (plants, ceramics, woven textures). Scenes should feel uncluttered, tactile and lived-in without visual noise—soft sunlight, warm ambient lighting, and purposeful minimalism throughout.
vibe_report.palette_rationale: A warm-neutral base (#EDE7DF, #CBB698) with mid-tone woods (#A88461) and deeper grounding accents (#6D6A5F, #2B2724) provides family-friendly warmth while maintaining the serene, minimal Japandi look. Use desaturated greens via plants as the only saturated color to anchor life and scale.
vibe_report.lighting_mood: Soft, warm ambient light with layered task and accent lighting. Day scenes emphasize soft sunlight through glazing and diffused window treatment; evening is warm and dimmable — rattan pendants and paper/linen shades for local pools of light.
materials: light oak and walnut woods (low-profile furniture frames)
woven rattan and seagrass (pendants, baskets, chair accents)
matte ceramic tableware and sculptural stoneware vases
natural fibre rugs (wool, jute, tatami-edge blends)
matte plaster or warm neutral paint for walls
textures: subtle wood grain, visible but not busy
low-pile wool and flatweave jute rugs
furniture_language: low, horizontal silhouettes (sofa, coffee table, bed)
rounded, simple forms (round dining table, sculptural vases)
slim, recessed legs on seating to create airy feel
multi-use pieces (bench that doubles as shoe storage)
integrated, inset shelving with minimal objects
styling_rules: keep surfaces intentionally sparse — 1–3 curated objects max
group ceramics/objects in odd numbers and low heights
layer a natural-fibre rug under low furniture to define zones
use plants selectively to add life and scale, not color
prioritize sightlines to the patio and natural light sources
avoid: bright, saturated colors or bold patterns
high gloss metal finishes (avoid reflective stainless appliances exposed in shots)
vertical visual clutter that competes with horizontal Japandi calm

room_guidance.headline: Living + Work Nook — layered low seating with a discreet standing desk
room_guidance.guidance: Center a low-profile sofa facing the patio; place a low wooden coffee table and textured rug to anchor the seating. Create a compact standing-desk nook near the glazing where daylight is strongest — choose a slim, oak-finish desk with a simple task lamp and cable management hidden. Add 2–3 medium plants to frame the entrance to the patio. Keep shelving minimal with 3–5 curated ceramics/books.
must_include: low-profile neutral sofa on wooden base
must_avoid: full-height office setups or large monitor arms

room_guidance.headline: Calm bedroom with family needs — safe crib + restful lines
room_guidance.guidance: Use a low platform bed with warm linen bedding and a small bedside pendant. Place the crib close to the bedroom window/wall to receive daylight but maintain required clearances; choose a simple, natural-wood crib. A small nursing/reading corner with a cozy chair and soft lamp is preferred over a large desk. Keep wall décor minimal — a single framed print or a woven wall piece.
must_include: low platform bed with warm linen
must_avoid: full-size standing desks or large office furniture in bedroom
excessive toys or bright nursery colors

room_guidance.headline: Intimate bay dining — round oak table and rattan pendant
room_guidance.guidance: Stage the bay dining nook with a round oak table sized for 4, linen-upholstered simple chairs, and a single woven rattan pendant centered above. A single stoneware vase with dried stems provides a quiet centerpiece. Keep table settings minimal — neutral ceramic plates, linen napkins.
must_avoid: too many place settings or clutter on table

warnings: Crib placement must respect clearance from open windows/glazing and nearby cords/lamp wires — visually stage with safe distances.
Standing desk should be compact and visible as a corner element; avoid staging an oversized office setup that breaks the family-living narrative.
Assumed daylight levels come from plan metadata; confirm glass door orientation in final pass to avoid mismatched shadows.

overall_mood: calm minimalism with earthy warmth and tactile layers — serene, functional, family-ready
global_style_notes: Keep all color accents desaturated and tied to natural materials; only plants introduce livelier greens.
Focus camera angles on horizontal lines and sightlines to the patio to sell the open-plan flow.
Texture is the primary source of visual interest: weave, linen, matte ceramics, and wood grain.
Avoid visible wires, busy appliance faces, or high-gloss reflections in camera-facing surfaces.
Scale furniture to each room's measured dimensions—favor smaller, low-profile pieces in the 11–13 ft spaces.
negative_prompt: no neon/saturated colors; no ornate or baroque elements; no heavy reflective stainless steel finishes; no cluttered surfaces; no visible people; no unrealistic floating furniture or incorrect scale proportions

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Day: soft warm daylight from glass door with fill from recessed warm-ambient ceiling; add a floor lamp and one dimmable wall sconce near the standing desk. Evening: rattan pendant over seating area + low ambient uplight behind sofa.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: View from entry looking across living area toward wide glass doors to the patio. Low-profile, light-oak framed sofa centered on a layered jute + wool rug; low rectangular oak coffee table with one sculptural ceramic and a small stack of books. Standing desk tucked to the right of the glass door — slim oak surface, minimal monitor (or laptop closed), small task lamp, cable hidden. Two medium potted plants frame the doorway to patio. Neutral palette: light linen, warm wood, soft gray-green plant tones. Textures: linen cushions, open-weave rattan basket, matte ceramic.
room_plans.video_prompt: Begin near the entry, slowly reveal the seating area, glide toward the standing desk, and finish on the patio view; emphasize material close-ups (wood grain, linen, ceramics).
must_avoid: bright colored toys left in shot

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Soft morning light from exterior window; bedside pendant or table lamp with warm tone. Use a dimmable reading lamp in the nursing/reading corner.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: View from bedroom doorway across a low platform bed dressed in warm linen. Natural-wood crib located on the window wall with safe clearance; neutral crib linens. Small upholstered reading chair and a slim floor lamp near the corner. Minimal dresser with one framed print and a small plant. Textures: flax linen, soft-woven rug, light wood tones.
room_plans.video_prompt: Slow dolly from doorway toward the bed, pause to show crib in natural light, close-up on linen textures and a softly lit reading lamp.
must_include: low platform bed with warm linen bedding

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Rattan pendant centered over the round table set to warm color temperature; daylight through the bay windows softly diffused by light linen blinds.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small bay dining nook with a round oak table sized for four, linen-upholstered chairs, woven rattan pendant centered above. Table styled sparsely: one matte stoneware vase with dried stems and two neutral place settings. Background: simple woven runner, minimal wall art, soft natural light entering through multi-panel windows.
room_plans.video_prompt: Static zoom in from the living toward the dining nook, settle on the pendant and the stoneware centerpiece, rotate slightly to show the bay window panels.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Even, warm undercabinet task lighting plus a single linear fixture over the worktop. Ambient light borrowed from adjacent dining and living zones.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Compact galley kitchen with matte, wood-faced lower cabinetry and light neutral upper surfaces or open shelving. Butcher-block counter, matte black integrated sink fixtures and minimal visible appliances (stove, small kettle). Open shelf displays a few matte ceramics and a wooden cutting board. Keep countertops mostly clear with one small potted herb and a folded linen tea towel.
room_plans.video_prompt: Slow dolly along the worktop from the entry side toward the dining connection, highlight textured ceramics on open shelf and the butcher-block surface.
must_include: matte wood cabinetry or integrated panels
must_avoid: shiny stainless appliances visible to camera

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Natural daylight with soft shadow; accent string or lantern lights for evening mood shots. Keep light warm and indirect.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Covered patio visually connected to living and dining. Low seating: teak or oak bench with floor cushions and low coffee table, woven mats and two large potted plants. Styling: few weather-resistant ceramics and a small stack of outdoor cushions. Maintain sightlines back into the living area.
room_plans.video_prompt: Aerial drift from patio outward to show flow between outdoor seating and interior, linger on textures and the transition threshold.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Soft, warm vanity lighting with a diffused overhead for even fill; avoid harsh directional light.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small bathroom with warm plaster or neutral tiles, floating wood vanity with matte stone sink, round mirror with warm backlight. Minimal shelf with one rolled linen towel and a small plant. Textures: matte tile, warm wood, soft textiles.
room_plans.video_prompt: Static zoom onto the vanity and mirror; close-up on ceramic sink and folded linen towel detail.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Even, cool-warm mixed utility lighting; use a concealed strip light inside storage alcove for depth.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Compact laundry area with stacked washer/dryer behind a sliding door, wooden shelf above for baskets, neutral tile floor. Styling minimal: two woven laundry baskets and folded linens.
room_plans.video_prompt: Static zoom on organized stacked laundry and shelving; emphasize tidy storage and natural materials.
must_avoid: exposed plumbing or messy laundry piles

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Soft, directional shelf lighting with warm temperature to showcase wood finishes and textiles.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small dressing closet with open built-ins in light wood, minimal hanging garments in neutral palette, a slim bench with a woven basket. Keep styling sparse to suggest organization.
room_plans.video_prompt: Slow dolly along the closet rail to show organized garments and textured shelving.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Soft wall sconce and overhead ambient; highlight the entry bench area with a warm uplight.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small entry vestibule with a simple wooden bench, shoe storage beneath or hidden, wall hooks, a round mirror and a woven basket. Neutral palette and textured doormat.
room_plans.video_prompt: Slow dolly from entry door inwards, pause at bench and mirror; show functional family-ready staging.
must_include: wood bench with hidden shoe storage

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Utility ambient lighting; keep shelves discreet and doors closed where possible.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small storage closet near entry — show closed door or a neatly organized open shelf with woven baskets and labeled boxes. Neutral finishes to match corridor.
room_plans.video_prompt: Static zoom to indicate storage exists without showing overcrowding.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Low ambient light; keep visual focus on adjacent living and patio.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small closet/storage near patio — present as tidy with stacked outdoor cushion storage and one hanging garden tool behind closed door.
room_plans.video_prompt: Static zoom to the closed storage door as part of the patio-living sequence.

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Low, even corridor lighting with a warm runner highlight; use recessed wall washers to add depth.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Central hall connecting main rooms with a simple runner, one wall hook or small console, minimal artwork. Keep scale small and unobtrusive to emphasize flow.
room_plans.video_prompt: Slow dolly along the hallway to demonstrate clear circulation and connections to the main rooms.

warnings: Verify crib clearance from windows and any reachable cords; stage with safety-first placement.
Confirm the actual orientation of glazing relative to sun to avoid mismatched shadow direction in sequences.
Keep standing desk minimal to avoid visual mismatch with the Japandi aesthetic—large office setups will break the mood.
